title: Initialize source registry project scaffold
action: Create the minimal repository scaffold needed for a dependency-free source registry and validation script.
implementation: Create `package.json` with `type: module`, project name `gesp-classification-catalog`, and script `validate:sources` mapped to `node scripts/validate-source-registry.mjs`.
Create `data/source-registry/README.md` explaining that registry files are metadata-first and not problem-statement storage.
Create placeholder files `scripts/.gitkeep` and `docs/.gitkeep` if their directories have no concrete files yet.

execution.summary: Created minimal Node project scaffold and source registry README.
